mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) from (select mb.*, m.name, m.color_code, m.model, m.color, mc.name category, m.unit mUnit, ps.model supplier_model, ps.pack, s.supplier supplier_name from jsh_material_bom mb left join jsh_material_extend me on mb.bar_code=me.bar_code and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material m on m.id=me.material_id and ifnull(m.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_category mc on m.category_id = mc.id and ifnull(mc.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_product_supplier ps on mb.department = ps.id and ifnull(ps.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_supplier s on ps.supplier_id = s.id and ifnull(s.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and (mb.upper is null or mb.upper = '')
and mb.parent = #{parent}
and (lower(mb.project)=lower(#{project}) or lower(mb.project) like lower(#{bindTail}) or lower(mb.project) like lower(#{bindHead}) or lower(mb.project) like lower(#{bindBody}))
and (mb.bar_code like #{bindKey} or m.name like #{bindKey} or m.color_code like #{bindKey} or m.other_field5 like #{bindKey} or m.color like #{bindKey} or m.model like #{bindKey} or ps.model like #{bindKey})
and m.category_id in
#{item}
and ifnull(mb.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by mb.bar_code, mb.parent, mb.upper, mb.project) a
